scripts.build: npm i && mkdir output && npm run prep && npm run zip && npm run copy && npm run clean
scripts.prep: cd scripts && npm i && npm run prep:yt_source && npm run prep:yt_search && cd ..
scripts.copy: cp yt_search.zip output && cp yt_source.zip output
scripts.clean: rm yt_search.zip && rm yt_source.zip && rm -rf scripts/yt_search && rm -rf scripts/yt_source
